0.title: Golden Age of Athens
0.desc: Socrates, Plato, and Aristotle establish the foundations of Western philosophy.

0.title: Alexander the Great
0.desc: His conquests spread Hellenistic culture across Egypt, Persia, and parts of India.

0.title: Library of Alexandria
0.desc: Established as a major center for storing and translating knowledge from across the world.

1.title: Birth of Muhammad
1.desc: Born in Mecca into the Hashim clan of the Quraysh tribe.

1.title: First Revelation
1.desc: Receives the first verses of the Quran at Mount Hira near Mecca.

1.title: The Hijrah
1.desc: Migration from Mecca to Medina; marks the beginning of the Islamic (Hijri) calendar.

1.title: Farewell Pilgrimage
1.desc: The Prophet's final pilgrimage and sermon; he passes away shortly after.

2.title: Election of Abu Bakr
2.desc: Becomes the first Caliph; suppresses the Ridda (Apostasy) wars to unify Arabia.

2.title: Battle of Yarmouk
2.desc: Decisive Muslim victory over the Byzantine Empire in the Levant.

2.title: Capture of Jerusalem
2.desc: The city surrenders to Caliph Umar ibn al-Khattab.

2.title: Assassination of Ali
2.desc: Marks the end of the Rashidun era.

3.title: Umayyad Dynasty begins
3.desc: Capital moves to Damascus; Muawiyah I establishes hereditary rule.

3.title: Dome of the Rock
3.desc: Completed in Jerusalem under Caliph Abd al-Malik.

3.title: Abbasid Revolution
3.desc: The Abbasids overthrow the Umayyads, shifting focus to Baghdad.

3.title: House of Wisdom
3.desc: Al-Ma'mun expands the Bayt al-Hikma for scientific translation.

4.title: Battle of Manzikert
4.desc: Seljuk Turks defeat the Byzantines, opening Anatolia to settlement.

4.title: Saladin's Victory
4.desc: Ayyubid Sultan Saladin recaptures Jerusalem after the Battle of Hattin.

4.title: Siege of Baghdad
4.desc: Mongols sack the city, ending the Abbasid Golden Age.

4.title: Ibn Battuta's Travels
4.desc: The world-renowned explorer completes his journeys.

5.title: Fall of Constantinople
5.desc: Mehmed the Conqueror takes the city, making it the Ottoman capital.

5.title: Safavid State founded
5.desc: Shah Ismail I establishes the Safavid Empire with Twelver Shi'ism.

5.title: Mughal Empire founded
5.desc: Babur defeats the Delhi Sultanate at the First Battle of Panipat.

5.title: Completion of Taj Mahal
5.desc: Built by Mughal Emperor Shah Jahan.

6.title: Independence of Pakistan
6.desc: Creation of a sovereign state for Muslims in South Asia.

6.title: Formation of the OIC
6.desc: Organization of Islamic Cooperation is established.

6.title: Iranian Revolution
6.desc: Establishment of the Islamic Republic of Iran.
